questions.question: In which country was the epicentre of the 6.1 magnitude earthquake that affected Delhi in December
questions.explanation: An earthquake of magnitude 6.1 on the Richter scale struck the Hindu Kush region. The quake originated north of Kabul in Afghanistan. The depth of the quake’s origin was 212 km. The tremors were felt in Delhi NCR, J&K, Rajasthan, Himachal Pradesh, Haryana and Punjab.

questions.question: Which is the largest constellation in the sky?
questions.explanation: There are 88 standard constellations. Among them, hydra is the largest. Followed by Virgo and Ursa Major.

questions.question: Where are volcanoes usually located?
questions.explanation: Volcanic activity takes place at the divergent and convergent plate boundaries. At the same time volcanoes also take place at hotspots.

questions.question: Who among the following put forward the theory of cirque formation?
questions.explanation: The Bergschrund theory was put forward by W.D.Johnson in 1904. It is related to the formation of cirque.

questions.question: Which among the following pairs is/are correctly matched? Horst – Depressed block of planetary crust bordered by parallel faults Oceanic trench – Depressed block of planetary crust bordered by parallel faults Select the correct code from the options given below:
questions.explanation: Oceanic trenches are long and narrow depressions of the sea floor. They are the deepest parts of the ocean floor. They are a type of tectonic landforms.Horst is a raised fault block bounded by normal faults. The word Horst in Dutch and German means ‘heap’. It is a raised block of earth’s crust that has been lifted. It is a tectonic landform.

questions.question: What is a mountain rising from the ocean seafloor that does not reach to the water’s surface called?
questions.explanation: A mountain rising from the ocean seafloor that does not reach to the water’s surface is called a Seamount. They are typically formed of extinct volcanoes.

questions.question: Which among the following statement is/are not correct about the landform Tor? It is a depositional landform It is a large free standing rock outcrop rising abruptly from the surrounding smooth and gentle slopes of a rounded hill. Select the correct code from the options given below:
questions.explanation: Tor is a large free standing rock outcrop rising abruptly from the surrounding smooth and gentle slopes of a rounded hill summit or ridge crest. They are also known as castle koppie.

questions.question: The “Yangtze River”, the longest river in Asia, is located in which nation?
questions.explanation: The Yangtze River of China is the longest river in Asia. It is the third-longest river in the world and also the longest river in the world to flow entirely within one country. It is the sixth-largest river by discharge volume in the world. This river houses the “Three Gorges Dam”, the largest hydro-electric power station in the world. This river originates from Jari Hills of Tanggula Mountains and drains its water to the East China Sea.

questions.question: Which is the highest peak in the Hindukush Mountains?
questions.explanation: The Hindukush mountains, located in Pakistan and Afghanistan are a folded mountain range. Mt. Trich Mir is the highest peak in the Hindukush Mountains.

questions.question: Which is the highest mountain in the Antarctica?
questions.explanation: Mount Vinson Massif is the highest mountain in Antarctic continent. Its summit is 4897 metres above sea level. It is located in Antarctica.
